positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range silhouette art, perfectly symmetrical composition, rendered in deep indigo and vibrant burnt orange against a clean off-white background. The mountains are stylized and flowing, suggesting a blend of nature and celestial energy. Clean, crisp lines, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, centered, geometric layout, flat graphic design, no shading or gradients, highly detailed silhouette.
negative: blur, noisy, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, low resolution, complex background, gradient, realistic, smoke, grain, logo, signature, debris, extra limbs, bad anatomy
